previewDescription: Review the generated placeholder before you download it.
optionsDescription: Adjust dimensions, background, text, and export settings.
dimensionsDescription: Choose a preset or enter exact dimensions in pixels.
backgroundDescription: Use a solid fill or switch to a gradient background.
textDescription: Add custom copy and control how it appears in the center.
qualityDescription: Quality affects JPEG and WebP exports.
downloadDescription: Export as PNG, SVG, JPEG, or WebP.
